Name: NETWORK_AREA_PARAM
Description: Defines network region grid settings and multiplayer feature availability within specific world areas, including message, ghost, and invasion systems.

Fields.Name: Cell Size: X
Fields.Description: Width of a single network grid cell.

Fields.Name: Cell Size: Y
Fields.Description: Height of a single network grid cell.

Fields.Name: Cell Size: Z
Fields.Description: Depth of a single network grid cell.

Fields.Name: Cell Offset: X
Fields.Description: X-axis offset applied to the network grid positioning.

Fields.Name: Cell Offset: Y
Fields.Description: Y-axis offset applied to the network grid positioning.

Fields.Name: Cell Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Z-axis offset applied to the network grid positioning.

Fields.Name: Enable Bloodstains and Death Phantoms
Fields.Description: Determines whether bloodstains and death replays are visible in this area.

Fields.Name: Enable Blood Messages
Fields.Description: Determines whether player-written blood messages are visible.

Fields.Name: Enable Ghosts
Fields.Description: Determines whether ghost replays of other players are shown.

Fields.Name: Enable Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Enables or disables multiplayer interactions in this area.

Fields.Name: Enable Ring Search
Fields.Description: Allows ring-based matchmaking or search systems in this area.

Fields.Name: Enable Invasion Search
Fields.Description: Allows matchmaking for invasion-style multiplayer encounters.
